mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT post_id, user_id, title, content, category, view_count, like_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM COMMUNITY WHERE status = 'DISPLAY' ORDER BY like_count DESC, post_id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3
SELECT post_id, user_id, title, content, category, view_count, like_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM COMMUNITY WHERE category = 'NOTICE' AND status = 'DISPLAY' ORDER BY post_id DESC
SELECT post_id, user_id, title, content, category, view_count, like_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM COMMUNITY WHERE category = 'EVENT' AND status = 'DISPLAY' ORDER BY post_id DESC
SELECT post_id, user_id, title, content, category, view_count, like_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM COMMUNITY WHERE post_id = #{post_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMUNITY ( post_id, user_id, title, content, category, view_count, like_count, status, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_POST.NEXTVAL, #{user_id}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category}, 0, 0, 'DISPLAY', SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMUNITY SET status = 'HIDDEN', updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{post_id}
